calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ADELA CRISTALES, TEL. NO. 684-0061, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Denied. Judgment debtor has failed to show that the funds levied upon are exempt. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/AJR)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES NA'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption to be heard at 9:30 am on the Law and Motion calendar. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
